collision energy: data-dependent MS/MS scans were conducted at a resolution of 120,000 with 30% HCD collision energy.
fragmentation method: data-dependent MS/MS scans were conducted at a resolution of 120,000 with 30% HCD collision energy.
instrument: An Orbitrap Exploris 480 Mass Spectrometer (Thermo Scientific) was used to evaluate the peptide fractions.
labeling: Peptide analysis was performed on fraction (2) using Biopharma Finder 4.0 software.
reduction reagent: the final wash was done with 50 mM Tris base at pH 8 and the resulting pellet was dissolved in 500 µL of 50 mM Tris base at pH 9 followed by concentration using Vivaspin 20 filter devices with MWCO 3 kDa (Sartorius) to concentrate the peptides with MW ≤ 3 kDa.
reduction concentration: the final wash was done with 50 mM Tris base at pH 8 and the resulting pellet was dissolved in 500 µL of 50 mM Tris base at pH 9 followed by concentration using Vivaspin 20 filter devices with MWCO 3 kDa (Sartorius) to concentrate the peptides with MW ≤ 3 kDa.
